eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL DANGER WARNING for the following counties or areas: Lake, CO; at 5:16 PM on JUN 28, 2026 Effective until 7:16 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: From the Lake Co Sheriff; A wildfire is threatening areas southeast of Turquoise Lake. Mandatory evacuations: leave now, do not delay. Evacuation center available at Colorado College. More info on Lake County Emergency Management Facebook.
